purpose: Export authorized sent-only Messages and Gmail acquisition products into a private, closed, multi-register author-corpus package. Emits only a standard SETEC envelope containing a hash-bound no-prose producer receipt; raw prose and identifiers remain local.
use_when: You have private acquire_imessage_sent/acquire_gmail_sent identity-baseline outputs
You need explicit text.personal/email.* register identities and stable HMAC groups
You have completed the bounded live-smoke gate before a full export
do_not_use_when: You want incoming/third-party conversation context (sent-only R1a does not export it)
You cannot supply an owner-only HMAC key and private destination
You need an authorship, consent, provenance, quality, or AI/human verdict

compute.cost_note: stdlib-only local hashing/copy; no models, API, or network

examples.description: Create an owner-only key and validate an email export without writing it
examples.cmd: umask 077 && mkdir -p ai-prose-baselines-private && openssl rand -out ai-prose-baselines-private/author-corpus.key 32 && python3 plugins/setec-voiceprint/scripts/author_corpus_export.py --source-manifest gmail_sent=ai-prose-baselines-private/gmail/draft_manifest.jsonl --register-map gmail_sent:personal=email.personal --allowed-ai-status pre_ai_human --persona me --hmac-key ai-prose-baselines-private/author-corpus.key --output-dir ai-prose-baselines-private/package --dry-run --json
